description: You are a Sustainability Engineer retrofitting a factory roof in Energy3D. Open the existing project at '~/Documents/Energy3D/factory_base.ng3'. Select the main building roof and change its design to a 'Sawtooth' roof to optimize for solar capture. Add Solar Panels exclusively to the south-facing angled slopes of this new sawtooth roof. Next, change the environment location to Detroit, MI (via the map/location settings). Run the 'Annual Energy Analysis' for the building to calculate its 12-month performance. Export the resulting analysis data as a CSV file to '~/Documents/Energy3D/factory_annual_energy.csv'. Finally, save the modified project as '~/Documents/Energy3D/factory_sawtooth_solar.ng3'.
